ip_outcome_note: No suspected_ip flag was set on this card. Research identified it as Emperor's New Groove franchise — the octopus guard is based on the potion-transformation scene in the 2000 film. No external crossover IP risk (internal Disney property).

trivia_bullets.text: Classified under The Emperor's New Groove franchise (not Aladdin). The octopus guard references the film's climactic potion scene where Yzma's palace guards are accidentally transformed into animals — one becoming an octopus that pursues Kuzco and Pacha wielding axes.
sources: TV Tropes: The Emperor's New Groove

trivia_bullets.text: Reign of Jafar (set 8, 2025) concludes Lorcana's second story arc — Jafar uses the Hexwell Crown to seize Archazia's Island and fill it with guards and automatons. Emperor's New Groove characters appear alongside the Aladdin-centric set narrative; Lorcana regularly mixes franchises within sets.

Cost 1, Strength 1, Willpower 2, Amethyst Common. HEAVILY ARMED grants Challenger +1 whenever you draw a card. At 1-cost base, rewards draw-heavy Amethyst builds — each card drawn increases combat threat for that turn.

HEAVILY ARMED is a pun on the octopus's multiple arms, with the art showing all tentacles wielding hammers simultaneously. 'Royal Guard' without a personal name is consistent with depicting a generic transformed palace guard rather than a named character.

related_cards.note: Emperor's New Groove protagonist; same franchise

related_cards.name: Yzma
related_cards.note: Villain who orders the guards; responsible for the potion transformation

related_cards.note: Yzma's henchman; Emperor's New Groove franchise companion
